$comment: Canonical: docs/testing/smoke-test-design.md (Devnet + USDC faucet sections) and docs/technical/full-stack-devnet.md (Compose stack). This file is the single source of truth for the Base mainnet fork point that the smoke-test Geth+Lighthouse devnet boots from. The genesis ingester (see issue #255) reads `block_number` and `snapshot_uri` to populate `genesis.json::alloc` from Base state at the pinned block, restricted to `ingested_addresses`. The harness then patches USDC storage to grant `harness_usdc_holder` a clean-history USDC balance — see docs for the why (no whale impersonation). `block_number` and `snapshot_uri` MUST stay in lockstep with `testing/fixtures/fork-state/CURRENT.json` (the Anvil fork-e2e fixture) so both harnesses exercise identical on-chain state. The CI manifest validator asserts this alignment.
$comment_pinned: When `pinned` is false the manifest is structurally valid but `block_hash` has not been verified against an archive RPC. The genesis ingester refuses to build a final devnet image unless `pinned` is true. Flipping this flag to true requires (a) populating `block_hash` with the real Base block hash at `block_number` and (b) updating `snapshot_uri` to point at a snapshot artifact derived from that exact block.
